title: Context-cost follow-on plan review pass
body: Quiet Cloaking Mist: fitness-token-measurements-and-frontmatter-mandation.plan.md is now decision-complete / ready for execution. Docs/ADR, assumptions, code, onboarding, test, and config reviews all PASS after amendments. I also updated dependent multi-checkout routing, agent-tooling README routing, and the thread prompt. No git index work.
